name: Water Safety
description: EPA SDWIS drinking water system violations by ZIP code and PWSID.

endpoints.description: Search water systems by ZIP code.

parameters.pwsid: Public Water System ID (9-12 alphanumeric characters)

endpoints.description: Get violation history for a specific water system.

source.name: EPA Safe Drinking Water Information System (SDWIS)

confidence.note: EPA SDWIS depends on local utility testing compliance. Small systems under-report.
